productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Chad Red Kidswear
description: CompositionRed pin striped shirt made of 100% cotton, with a pocket on the left chest with an embroidered brand mark and brand print in black on the backFittingRegular47 cmWash care    Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed    Use mild detergent    Dry cleaning possible    Do not bleach    Avoid soaking    Remove promptly    Dry flat inside out in shade    Iron at medium setting only    Iron on reverse    Wash before wearingYour little boy is all set to don that big boy look in this red pin striped shirt from Levi's. The left pocket with an embroidered brand mark will make him look like a little hero among his friends, while the black brand print on the back adds to his style statement. The soft fabric will keep him all cool and comfortable while he is busy playing around. Team it with denims and small sneakers for that complete grown up look.
